prompts.title: 混沌笔记 隐藏面容角色艺术
prompts.prompt:
# 混沌としたメモ書き・記号の集合体からキャラクターの顔を浮かび上がらせるアート

--- スタイル
- 白い紙の上に黒インクで描かれた大量の手書きメモ、数式、記号、ランダムな線。
- 紙いっぱいに散らばる書き殴り風のカオス。
- 所々に赤インクの強調(ライン、塗り潰し、マーカー風の塊)。
- アナログのノート落書きのような質感。

--- 構図
- ランダムなメモや記号が全体を覆い尽くす。
- 黒インクの線や文字の密度が「キャラクターの顔」の位置に集中する。
- 結果として、混沌の中から「与えられたキャラクターの顔のシルエット・表情」がうっすら浮かび上がる。
- 顔は写実的ではなく、カオスの断片が集まって形を成す。

--- 色彩
- モノクロ(黒・白)を主体に構成。
- 赤インクをアクセントとして散発的に配置。
- 彩度は抑えめ、アナログの紙とインク感を重視。

--- 表現要素
- 読めるようで読めない文字列、日本語や英数字が混在。
- 数式記号、矢印、点、斜線、クロス、ドリップ(インクの飛び散り)。
- キャラクターの顔の目や髪の輪郭は、メモや記号の配置の「余白」や「濃淡」で浮かび上がる。

--- 禁止事項
- 顔を直接的に描き込む写実ポートレート。
- デジタル処理的で整然とした幾何学模様。
- カラフルな彩色や過飽和表現。
- ロゴ、透かし、人工的なCG感。

--- Definition of Done (DoD)
- 全体は「混沌としたメモ・記号の集合体」として成立している。 
- 与えられたキャラクターの顔が、混沌の濃淡・配置から自然に浮かび上がる。 
- 色はモノクロ+赤アクセントのみ。 
- 紙とインクの手描き的質感を保持している。
tags: 混沌笔记 隐藏面容角色艺术

prompts.prompt: Create a collectible fine-art editorial photograph inspired by classical Chinese garden aesthetics: a young Hanfu woman sits in a serene Suzhou-style courtyard, holding a traditional pear-shaped pipa vertically so it partially covers her face. She wears {argument name="robe color" default="pale aqua translucent outer robe"}, a white inner robe, and a black embroidered skirt with delicate floral patterns; her hair is styled in an elegant Tang/Song-inspired updo with small pink flower hairpins. The composition is vertical, calm, and painterly, with the subject placed slightly left of center, seated beside rugged grey Taihu scholar rocks and a tuft of grass at the lower right. A white plaster wall fills the background, with one flowering branch extending diagonally from the upper left across the empty space. Add vertical Chinese calligraphy in black ink on the upper right of the wall, with two small red seal stamps below it, like a signed literati photograph. Use soft natural daylight, muted pastel colors, shallow depth of field, realistic fabric translucency, detailed pipa wood grain and frets, subtle film texture, and the atmosphere of a top-tier museum-quality fashion portrait rather than an illustration. The image contains exactly 5 main visible elements: 1 seated Hanfu musician, 1 pipa, 1 flowering branch, 1 cluster of Taihu rocks, and 1 vertical calligraphy inscription with red seals. Keep the face intentionally softened or obscured by the instrument for privacy and mystery. No modern objects, no watermark, no extra people.

prompts.title: 信息图 / 教育视觉 - 柔和色系身高差闺蜜
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a nostalgic pastel Japanese height-difference comparison illustration for two best friends, with a central measuring ruler and cute profile poses.

Canvas: Vertical portrait image, soft pale pink paper-textured background, delicate brown line art, watercolor/anime fashion illustration style, gentle vintage stationery aesthetic. Add a faint small “Ai” mark in the upper-left corner.

Layout: Center a tall decorative height ruler from 0 cm to 200 cm, topped with the vertical Japanese title 「身長計」. Place exactly 2 full-body girls in side profile facing each other: the shorter girl on the left and the taller girl on the right. Draw dashed horizontal guide lines from each girl’s head to the ruler. Add exactly 2 ornate name-and-height cards near the top, one left and one right. Add exactly 2 cloud-shaped thought bubbles near the lower sides, one for each girl. Add a small bottom plaque centered under the ruler.

Central height ruler details: A narrow cream-colored vertical ruler with ornate corners and thin brown border. Mark every 10 cm from 0 cm to 200 cm with labels: 0 cm, 10 cm, 20 cm, 30 cm, 40 cm, 50 cm, 60 cm, 70 cm, 80 cm, 90 cm, 100 cm, 110 cm, 120 cm, 130 cm, 140 cm, 150 cm, 160 cm, 165 cm, 170 cm, 180 cm, 190 cm, 200 cm. Include small tick marks between labels. The shorter girl’s dashed line aligns at 150 cm, and the taller girl’s dashed line aligns at 160 cm.

Left character: A petite girl named {argument name="left character name" default="ひな"}, height {argument name="left character height" default="150cm"}. She stands in profile facing right, hands relaxed at her sides, wearing a white short-sleeve blouse under a dark blue denim overall dress, loose white socks, and black high-top sneakers. She has long dark brown hair in a high ponytail with soft strands and a small scrunchie. Her face is intentionally obscured with a soft square blur.

Right character: A taller girl named {argument name="right character name" default="あおい"}, height {argument name="right character height" default="160cm"}. She stands in profile facing left with a relaxed posture, hands in pockets, wearing an oversized beige knit sweater, loose faded blue jeans, and black-and-white low-top sneakers. She has long dark brown hair tied in a high ponytail with wispy bangs and flowing strands. Her face is intentionally obscured with a soft square blur.

Text content: Use Japanese text exactly as visible. Left top card has “Name”, 「ひな」, “Height”, “150cm”. Right top card has “Name”, 「あおい」, “Height”, “160cm”. Left thought bubble says 「あおい、まだ背が伸びた？羨ましいな…」. Right thought bubble says 「ひなはこのままで可愛いよ♡」. Bottom plaque says {argument name="relationship label" default="大親友"}, with a small heart icon on each side.

Style constraints: Keep the illustration delicate, soft, and feminine; use muted browns for outlines and text, cream panels, and pastel pink background. Maintain clean readable typography with a Japanese serif feel. Do not add extra characters, extra cards, extra speech bubbles, or additional decorative objects beyond the hearts and simple ornamental borders.

prompts.title: 信息图 / 教育视觉 - 日本手抄本工作坊幻灯片网格
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a high-density presentation overview image showing exactly 9 miniature slides from a Japanese business training deck about {argument name="course topic" default="Codex slide creation workshop"}. The slides should look like a polished AI-generated corporate consulting deck, arranged as a 3 by 3 grid on a white background with thin gaps between slides, each slide in 16:9 landscape format.

Canvas: Wide rectangular collage, approximately 2:1 aspect ratio, crisp vector-like slide thumbnails, white and navy color palette with small accents in blue, cyan, red, and gray. Use clean Japanese corporate typography, tiny but structured text blocks, charts, cards, icons, and slide numbers. Add a subtle professional workshop identity, like a small square “CX” logo and the label “CODEX SLIDE WORKSHOP” on multiple slides.

Layout: Include exactly 9 distinct slides:
1. Title slide: minimalist white slide with a navy “CX” logo at left, small spaced text “CODEX SLIDE WORKSHOP,” bold Japanese title 「誰でも出来る！Codex スライド作成講座」, date 「2026.05.31」, and a small subtitle about AI workflow / slide production.
2. Skills slide: title 「SKILLとは？目的を達成するための“技伝のタレ”」 with dense analytical layout, left vertical icon strip, numbered skill list, two small scatter/line charts, one donut chart, and multiple navy callout boxes.
3. Formula slide: title 「キレイ式AIスライド作成実践開始」 showing a process framework with icon cards, a comparison table, a small bar chart, and a dark navy bottom message banner.
4. Workflow slide: title 「Codexの使い方の簡単な流れ」 with a horizontal sequence of exactly 8 process cards using simple icons such as target, folder, cube, document, CX logo, chat bubble, circular arrows, and checkmark; include small tables, a donut chart, and a dark navy side memo box.
5. Goal slide: title 「本日のゴール」 with three numbered goal blocks on the left, a radar chart in the middle, progress bars on the right, and a bottom section containing a checklist table and navy callout box.
6. Simple creation slide: title 「Codexで、簡単に色々出来ちゃう！」 with a left column of three icon cards, a central bar chart, a donut chart at right, and a row of six small capability cards along the bottom.
7. Usage confusion slide: title 「けど、どう使えばいいか分からない」 with a large slanted funnel/pyramid chart on the left containing four stages and percentages, plus a donut chart, a vertical bar chart, a bottom table, and a dark navy quote card.
8. Efficiency slide: title 「本当はCodexをゴリゴリ使って、いろんなことを効率化したい」 with several horizontal bar charts, a line chart trending upward, four lower KPI cards with red negative percentages, and a navy recommendation box.
9. Explanation slide: title 「Codex使ってますか？」 with three explanatory bullet sections on the left, a central donut chart, a right-side bar chart, and a bottom row of KPI cards showing large figures such as -45%, -38%, 1日→90分, and +52%.

Visual style: Japanese management-consulting slide aesthetic, dense information design, crisp dark navy headers, thin gray grid lines, rounded cards, small monochrome icons, data visualization elements, and consistent spacing. Use realistic slide thumbnails rather than a single readable slide; the text may be tiny but should feel authentic and structured.

Text content: Preserve the main Japanese titles exactly where visible, especially {argument name="main title" default="誰でも出来る！Codex スライド作成講座"}, {argument name="workshop label" default="CODEX SLIDE WORKSHOP"}, and section titles containing {argument name="product name" default="Codex"}. Japanese body text can be small pseudo-realistic business copy, but keep headings, percentages, and chart labels consistent with the deck theme.

Constraints: Show exactly 9 slides, no people, no photographs, no watermark, no browser UI, no mockup device frame. The final image should look like a screenshot of an impressive complete slide deck generated for a workshop announcement.

prompts.title: 信息图 / 教育视觉 - 雨天动漫词汇表
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a detailed Japanese-style illustrated reference sheet infographic titled {argument name="headline text" default="雨の日シチュの用語表"}, explaining useful rainy-day scene vocabulary for AI illustration prompts.

Canvas: Portrait 3:4 poster, aged cream watercolor paper with ink stains, tape, paperclips, torn memo scraps, tiny stars, raindrop doodles, umbrella doodles, and purple hydrangea decorations in the corners. Use a handmade scrapbook notebook aesthetic with thin navy divider lines and slightly worn edges.

Overall visual style: Soft anime watercolor and ink wash, melancholic rainy atmosphere, muted navy, gray, lavender, and beige palette. The recurring subject is {argument name="main character" default="a black-haired anime girl in a dark raincoat"}, usually wet from rain, carrying or standing under {argument name="umbrella color" default="a transparent or black umbrella"}. Add reflective wet streets, mist, puddles, raindrops on glass, and blurred city lights. Keep the text dense but neatly organized like a prompt-writing cheat sheet.

Header: Large centered brush-calligraphy Japanese headline using the headline text. Under it, add a smaller Japanese subtitle line explaining that the sheet organizes rain, rainy season, puddles, and road-reflection words for AI illustration prompt support. Place a large decorative character portrait at the upper left with hydrangeas; the face area is covered by a soft square blur, matching the generated look. At the upper right, add small taped memo papers and a decorative umbrella sketch.

Main layout: A grid of exactly 24 numbered vocabulary cards, arranged 4 columns by 6 rows. Each card has a dark blue circular number badge, a bold Japanese term title, two or three short Japanese explanatory text lines, and a small anime rainy-scene thumbnail. Use thin navy borders and off-white card backgrounds. Count and label the 24 cards as follows, with these visible concepts: 1 umbrella, 2 shared umbrella, 3 transparent umbrella, 4 wet hair, 5 wet school uniform, 6 rain lodging or taking shelter from rain, 7 under the eaves, 8 bus stop, 9 rain in front of the station, 10 sudden shower, 11 rain inside a train car, 12 window glass, 13 puddle, 14 road surface reflection, 15 raindrops, 16 misty rain, 17 muddy ground, 18 cloudy sky, 19 gray sky, 20 after the rain, 21 night rain, 22 neon reflections, 23 rainy-season humidity, 24 rainy-day aftermath.

Thumbnail details: Vary every card image while keeping the same rainy anime mood. Include close-up portraits, walking scenes, umbrellas, wet clothes, bus stop, station crowd, train window, puddle reflection, neon city street, hydrangea after rain, and rainy room or alley aftermath. Cards 10 and 11 should include soft gray square blurs over part of the character face area, echoing the original censored-looking artifacts.

Bottom section: Add a wide bordered note panel titled in Japanese as a usage guide, with exactly 5 bullet points in small Japanese text explaining how to use the vocabulary list for AI illustration prompts. Decorate the bottom with washi tape, a fountain pen ink bottle, scattered clips, handwritten memo scraps, small flowers, and tiny rain icons.

Constraints: The final image must feel like an information-dense printable reference sheet, not a single illustration. Use exactly 24 numbered cards and exactly 5 bottom bullet points. Keep the Japanese calligraphy headline prominent, maintain legible grid structure, and avoid adding logos or watermarks.

prompts.title: 社交媒体帖子 - 2D转3D超现实街头摄影
prompts.prompt: An {argument name="character setting" default="Asian adult female"} appears in {argument name="environment" default="Shibuya, Tokyo"}, close to or attached in front of a [background surface], using a front perspective, eye-level camera, and real street photography composition. The person's body is clearly divided into 2D and 3D states: the [2D body part] is a 2D flat printed image attached to the [background surface], while the [3D body part] suddenly turns into a real 3D human body starting from the [boundary position], entering the real space. The [2D body part] is completely a flat printed image, tightly attached to the [background surface], with no real thickness, volume, or protruding spatial structure. This 2D area presents the texture of real paper / poster / sticker / mural / wheatpaste poster, with a matte printing effect, slight fading, fine particles, paper fibers, aging marks, and edge wear. The edges of the 2D image can be slightly curled, peeled, or damaged, with visible glue marks, paste residue, torn paper scraps, or background texture in some areas. The texture of the [background surface] needs to show through or affect the 2D body area, such as concrete wall grains, brick wall gaps, metal plate scratches, old wood textures, graffiti marks, stains, cracks, sticker residue, etc., which should naturally blend with the 2D area of the character. The 2D body part should look like an image that has long been printed, pasted, spray-painted, or drawn on the background surface, rather than a real standing person. The [3D body part] suddenly transforms into a real 3D human body from the [boundary position], with complete real volume, anatomical structure, material details, light and shadow, perspective, occlusion, and physical contact. The 3D area should clearly enter the real space, forming a strong contrast with the 2D area. Skin, clothing, shoes, hair, accessories, or other body details should present hyper-realistic textures, with real highlights, shadows, folds, textures, and spatial depth. The [boundary position] between 2D and 3D must form a clear, sharp, precise, and visible boundary line. This boundary looks like a flat printed image and a real 3D human body being abruptly but accurately spliced together on the same body. The division cannot be blurred, gradient, or like a normal transformation or semi-transparent effect; it must clearly show: one side is a 2D flat image attached to the background, and the other side is a 3D body truly entering the real space. If there are graffiti, stickers, stains, cracks, spray paint, text, or other background elements in the scene, they can cover or press on the [2D body part], as if the background surface continued to be written on, spray-painted, or covered after the 2D image was pasted. Background elements should have a real surface relationship with the 2D body area rather than simply staying behind the person. The 3D body area needs to interact clearly with the real environment: if the [3D body part] includes feet, legs, hands, arms, head, or any body part sticking out, it must show real physical contact, shadows, occlusion, and spatial relationships. For example, feet stepping on the ground with slight pressure deformation; arms extending from the flat image, blocking the background and casting shadows on the wall or ground; the head protruding from the poster, with real facial volume, skin texture, and light/shadow structure. The overall style is surrealist real photography, maintaining the credibility of real street shots while strengthening the visual paradox of 2D and 3D body splicing. Lighting is [light condition], background is [background details], and the overall atmosphere is [visual style]. The image should have cinematic composition, high detail, real materials, real light and shadow, and real spatial perspective, hyper-realistic surreal photography, cinematic, photorealistic, high detail, 8K.

prompts.title: 漫画/故事板 - 哪吒火尖枪劈砍对比
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a wide side-by-side comparison image showing two cinematic generations of the same mythic punk warrior, demonstrating an over-sharpened raw look on the left versus a softer refined film look on the right.

Canvas: Extra-wide horizontal frame, about 2.7:1 aspect ratio, split into exactly 2 equal panels with a thin vertical white divider line at the center. No captions, no labels, no watermark.

Subject: In both panels, show {argument name="character name" default="Nezha"} as a fierce young adult East Asian warrior with spiky black hair, dark red and black leather-and-metal armor, bare midriff, wrist wraps, belts, and long red silk ribbons swirling around him. His face should be obscured by a simple square blur/mosaic block, matching the source image. He grips a long spear or staff with both hands, thrusting it diagonally toward the viewer, emitting supernatural fire.

Setting: A dark ancient temple or shrine interior with carved wooden architecture, gold statues, candles, smoke, worn floorboards, and warm amber torchlight. Background details include exactly 1 large gold seated statue centered deep in the left panel and exactly 1 gold guardian-like statue in the rear right panel. The environment should feel like a mythic action scene in a Tokyo-inspired NEZHA fantasy series.

Left panel: Raw GPT-style output look. Tight action close-up from the waist up, warrior angled left-to-right, spear crossing the frame horizontally. Red magical flame blooms from the spear tip near the upper right. Make the image intentionally over-sharpened and hyper-detailed: glossy skin, oily highlights, high micro-contrast, razor-sharp edges, wet-looking armor, exaggerated sweat, crunchy texture, CGI-like red flame, dramatic but slightly artificial HDR finish.

Right panel: Refined final-film look of the same scene. Slightly wider composition, warrior crouched or lunging in a lower stance, spear thrusting from center toward the right foreground with orange fire streaming out. Use softer lens rendering, natural motion blur, warmer orange flame, less glossy skin, less plastic texture, more atmospheric haze, shallow depth of field, cinematic grain, painterly realism, and believable physical lighting. Keep the right panel noticeably less sharp and less oily than the left.

Visual style: Dark fantasy action cinema, high-budget live-action concept art, warm amber and crimson palette, volumetric smoke, temple dust, ember particles, dynamic ribbons. The two panels should clearly contrast two visual treatments of the same {argument name="scene concept" default="Nezha fire spear attack inside a temple"}: left is over-rendered and artificial, right is cinematic and natural.

Constraints: Include exactly 2 panels, exactly 1 center divider, exactly 1 warrior in each panel, exactly 1 spear in each panel, and exactly 1 visible flame attack in each panel. Avoid text, logos, UI elements, extra characters, and additional split-screen sections.
tags: 漫画 / 故事板 - 哪吒火尖枪劈砍对比
